name: Ground Beef in Pita
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups peeled, seeded and chopped tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to a low temperature.
2. Heat butter in a skillet over low heat and sauté onion, garlic, and green pepper until just softened; do not brown.
3. Add ground beef, mustard, oregano, salt, and black pepper to the skillet. Stir and cook until the meat is no longer red.
4. At the last minute, stir in chopped tomatoes and cook briefly.
5. Cut each pita bread in half and stuff with the filling mixture.
6. Makes 4 generous servings.
